items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for status transitions during recovery.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the status transitions during recovery from degraded to healthy. However, the prior steps do not provide any evidence related to this specific requirement, nor do they confirm the presence of the necessary mechanisms for such transitions. As a result, it is not possible to determine if the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap in the implementation.
